use.flag: Enable Btrfs snapshot management in kernel configuration tab (requires kerneltools)
Enable dracut initramfs configuration editing (requires kerneltools)
Install AppIndicator extension for GNOME systray icon support (SNI protocol)
GRUB2 bootloader support in kernel configuration (beta)
Enable kernel configuration tab with auto-compile hooks, bootloader management, and kernel tools
Limine bootloader support in kernel configuration
rEFInd bootloader support in kernel configuration (beta)
Enable syntax highlighting in configuration editors (GtkSourceView)
systemd-boot bootloader support in kernel configuration (beta)
Enable embedded VTE terminal for Portage output

pkgmetadata.longdescription: gpkg is a graphical package manager for Gentoo Linux built with GTK4 and libadwaita. It provides a modern interface for managing Portage packages, including an integrated terminal, package search with USE flag management, system updates, news and elog viewer, graphical etc-update, disk cleanup, kernel configuration tools, and make.conf editing. It communicates with a privileged daemon via D-Bus for system operations.
